description: Audit names the unauthenticated write vulnerability on /users.
notes: Plants SEC-3 (no auth) on /users/{uid} with allow write: if true. The skill playbook says a good audit prioritizes critical findings and an unprotected write on /users is the canonical critical case. Report must mention the path or the vulnerability class so the user can act.
prompt: Audit my Firestore rules for security issues.
